result.stdout:
Description:
  Bitbucket code insights reporter for SARIF files.

Usage:
  BitbucketSarifReporter [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file> (REQUIRED)  The SARIF file to read and report to Bitbucket.
  -p, --proxy <proxy>           The address for the proxy server that authenticates requests. The default address is for direct usage in a Bitbucket Pipeline. Use 'http://host.docker.internal:29418' if this is running inside a custom pipe. [default: http://localhost:29418/]
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Bitbucket code insights reporter for SARIF files.

Usage:

Options:
  -f, --file <file> (REQUIRED)  The SARIF file to read and report to Bitbucket.
  -p, --proxy <proxy>           The address for the proxy server that authenticates requests. The default address is for direct usage in a Bitbucket Pipeline. Use 'http://host.docker.internal:29418' if this is running inside a custom pipe. [default: http://localhost:29418/]
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
